title: DY11 7WF, Brintons Carpets Ltd: environmental permit surrender issued - EPR/DP3936FJ/S004
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and site condition report evaluation template for:    Operator name: Brintons Carpets Ltd   Installation name: Stourport Road   Permit number: EPR/DP3936FJ/S004   "
